# FreeToolDev

> Free bulk/batch utility tools for developers and designers. All tools run client-side in the browser — no signup, no file uploads to a server.

## Tools
- [Bulk Image Resize / Convert / Compress](https://freetooldev.com/tools/image-batch.html): Resize, convert, and compress many images at once (PNG, JPG, WebP).
- [CSV to JSON (Batch)](https://freetooldev.com/tools/csv-to-json.html): Convert multiple CSV files to JSON at once.
- [Base64 Encode / Decode](https://freetooldev.com/tools/base64.html): Convert text to/from Base64, with batch line processing.
- [RSS Generator](https://freetooldev.com/tools/rss-generator.html): Generate a valid RSS 2.0 feed from a list of items.
- [Sitemap Generator](https://freetooldev.com/tools/sitemap-generator.html): Generate a sitemap.xml from a list of URLs.
- [IP / DNS / SSL Bulk Lookup](https://freetooldev.com/tools/ip-dns-ssl.html): Look up IP addresses, DNS records, and SSL certificate expiry for multiple domains at once.
- [Site Crawler & Audit](https://freetooldev.com/tools/site-crawler.html): Auto-crawl a site to generate sitemap.xml, rss.xml, and llms.txt, and find broken links/missing meta tags.
- [JWT Decoder (Batch)](https://freetooldev.com/tools/jwt-decoder.html): Decode multiple JWTs at once — header, payload, and expiry status for each, entirely client-side.
- [Bulk QR Code Generator](https://freetooldev.com/tools/qr-batch.html): Generate QR codes for a list of URLs or text at once, no upload required.
- [Bulk JSON Validator & Formatter](https://freetooldev.com/tools/json-validator.html): Validate and pretty-print multiple JSON snippets at once, pasted as text with no file upload.

- [A Free, Browser-Based Alternative to Screaming Frog for Small Sites](https://freetooldev.com/blog/free-alternative-screaming-frog.html)
- [JWT Claims Explained: Registered, Public, and Private](https://freetooldev.com/blog/jwt-claims-explained.html)
- [How to Find Broken Links on Your Site Without Installing Anything](https://freetooldev.com/blog/find-broken-links-free-tool.html)
- [RSS Generator Without an Account: Manual Builder vs. Auto-Scraper](https://freetooldev.com/blog/rss-generator-no-account.html)
- [Converting 100 Images: AI or a Tool?](https://freetooldev.com/blog/batch-vs-ai-image-convert.html)
- [Why Your JSON Won't Parse: Every Common Syntax Error, Explained](https://freetooldev.com/blog/json-syntax-errors-explained.html)
- [Validating JSON Without Uploading It Anywhere](https://freetooldev.com/blog/json-validator-no-upload.html)
